data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Auto-reminders for incomplete items', but the evidence provided does not confirm that this functionality is implemented. While the linked use case mentions an automated reminder for a specific task, it does not provide sufficient detail or evidence that this feature is consistently applied across all tasks or that it is configurable. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of consistent auto-reminders for all incomplete items.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for auto-reminders functionality
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that reminders are sent for all incomplete checklist items.
